objective_statement: Explain the CIA triad and how it guides security decisions
Describe common cybersecurity threat categories and actors
Explain foundational security concepts (authentication authorization least privilege)
Describe network security devices and their functions (firewalls IDS/IPS)
Explain the purpose and operation of common security protocols (TLS VPN ACL)
Identify common network-based attacks and their indicators
Describe endpoint security concepts and tools (antivirus EDR host firewall)
Explain patch management and its role in reducing endpoint risk
Identify mobile device security considerations and controls
Explain basic risk management concepts (likelihood impact risk tolerance)
Identify common vulnerability scanning tools and their outputs
Explain the phases of the incident response lifecycle
Describe the role of a support technician in incident containment and escalation
Identify common indicators of compromise and appropriate first-response actions
